translations.en: My opponent is playing aggressively today.
translations.es: Mi rival está jugando de forma agresiva hoy.
translations.fr: Mon adversaire joue de façon agressive aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi il mio avversario gioca in modo aggressivo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的对手今天踢得很凶。
translations.yue: 我嘅對手今日踢得好進取。
translations.pt: Meu adversário está jogando de forma agressiva hoje.
translations.vi: Đối thủ của tôi hôm nay chơi rất quyết liệt.
translations.hi: मेरा प्रतिद्वंद्वी आज आक्रामक खेल रहा है.
translations.el: Ο αντίπαλός μου σήμερα παίζει επιθετικά.
translations.nb: Motstanderen min spiller aggressivt i dag.
translations.id: Lawan saya hari ini bermain agresif.
translations.sv: Min motståndare spelar aggressivt i dag.
translations.da: Min modstander spiller aggressivt i dag.
translations.ja: 相手は今日攻撃的にプレーしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the subject noun; agrees with it in case/number/gender (nominative masculine singular).
Common noun serving as the subject of the clause (nominative singular).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; head of the predicate.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.
Manner adverb modifying the verb, describing how the action is performed.

sentences.target: Ich kenne meinen Gegner noch nicht.

translations.de: Ich kenne meinen Gegner noch nicht.
translations.en: I don’t know my opponent yet.
translations.es: Todavía no conozco a mi rival.
translations.fr: Je ne connais pas encore mon adversaire.
translations.it: Non conosco ancora il mio avversario.
translations.ru: Я ещё не знаю своего соперника.
translations.he: אני עדיין לא מכיר את היריב שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn chưa biết đối thủ của mình.
translations.nl: Ik ken mijn tegenstander nog niet.
translations.uk: Я ще не знаю свого суперника.
translations.hi: मैं अभी अपने प्रतिद्वंद्वी को नहीं जानता हूँ.
translations.el: Δεν γνωρίζω ακόμη τον αντίπαλό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner ikke motstanderen min ennå.
translations.sv: Jag känner inte min motståndare än.
translations.da: Jeg kender ikke min modstander endnu.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as the subject (nominative singular, 1st person).
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; selects a direct object.
Possessive determiner modifying the object noun (accusative masculine singular).
Common noun serving as the direct object (accusative singular).
Temporal/modal adverb; together with 'nicht' expresses 'not yet'.
Negation particle scoping over the predicate; forms the negative with 'noch'.

sentences.target: Wir respektieren jeden Gegner auf dem Platz.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ʁɛspɛkˈtiːʁən ˈjeːdən ˈgeːɡnɐ aʊ̯f deːm plats/

translations.de: Wir respektieren jeden Gegner auf dem Platz.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ʁɛspɛkˈtiːʁən ˈjeːdən ˈgeːɡnɐ aʊ̯f deːm plats/
translations.en: We respect every opponent on the field.
translations.es: Respetamos a todos los rivales en el campo.
translations.fr: Nous respectons chaque adversaire sur le terrain.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在场上尊重每一位对手。
translations.yue: 我哋喺球場上尊重每位對手。
translations.ru: Мы уважаем каждого соперника на поле.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tôn trọng mọi đối thủ trên sân.
translations.ar: نحن نحترم كل منافس في الملعب.
translations.nl: Wij respecteren elke tegenstander op het veld.
translations.uk: Ми поважаємо кожного суперника на полі.
translations.hi: हम मैदान पर हर प्रतिद्वंद्वी का सम्मान करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi respekterer hver motstander på banen.
translations.id: Kami menghormati setiap lawan di lapangan.
translations.sv: Vi respekterar varje motståndare på planen.
translations.da: Vi respekterer hver modstander på banen.
translations.ja: 私たちはピッチで出会うすべての相手を尊重します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun serving as the subject (nominative plural, 1st person).
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present; takes a direct object.
Quantifying determiner modifying the object noun (accusative masculine singular).
Common noun serving as the direct object (accusative singular).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase; selects dative here.
Definite article in dative masculine singular, modifying 'Platz' within the PP.
Common noun as the object of the preposition 'auf' (dative singular), indicating location.

sentences.target: Mein Gegner hat gerade das Level gewonnen.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈgeːɡnɐ hat ɡəˈʁaːdə das ˈlɛvl̩ ɡəˈvɔnən/

translations.de: Mein Gegner hat gerade das Level gewonnen.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈgeːɡnɐ hat ɡəˈʁaːdə das ˈlɛvl̩ ɡəˈvɔnən/
translations.en: My opponent just won the level.
translations.es: Mi rival acaba de ganar el nivel.
translations.fr: Mon adversaire vient de gagner le niveau.
translations.it: Il mio avversario ha appena vinto il livello.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的对手刚刚赢下了这一关。
translations.yue: 我嘅對手啱啱贏咗呢一關。
translations.ru: Мой соперник только что выиграл уровень.
translations.pt: Meu adversário acabou de vencer o nível.
translations.he: היריב שלי בדיוק ניצח את השלב.
translations.vi: Đối thủ của tôi vừa thắng màn này.
translations.nl: Mijn tegenstander heeft net het level gewonnen.
translations.hu: Az ellenfelem épp most megnyerte a szintet.
translations.hi: मेरे प्रतिद्वंद्वी ने अभी अभी लेवल जीत लिया.
translations.el: Ο αντίπαλός μου μόλις κέρδισε την πίστα.
translations.id: Lawan saya baru saja menang di level itu.
translations.ro: Adversarul meu tocmai a câștigat nivelul.
translations.ja: 相手がたった今レベルをクリアした。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the subject noun (nominative masculine singular).
Common noun serving as the subject of the clause (nominative singular).
Auxiliary verb (3rd person singular present) forming the perfect with the participle 'gewonnen'.
Temporal/aspectual adverb indicating recentness of the action.
Definite article (accusative neuter singular) modifying 'Level' as the direct object.
Common noun serving as the direct object of the verb (accusative neuter singular).
Past participle functioning as the main lexical verb in a perfect construction with 'hat'.
